column11: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains hexproof until end of turn. You gain 1 life.

column2: Centurion of Capernaum, Man Under Authority
column11:
Vigilance
When Centurion of Capernaum enters the battlefield, tap target creature an opponent controls. It doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.
column12: "For I also am a man set under authority." — Luke 7:8
